transcript: Speaker A: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀಯಾ? [What are you doing?] Speaker B: I sleeping. Speaker A: I am sleeping ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. ಸ್ವಲ್ಪ formal ಆಗಿ 'I am getting some sleep' ಅಂತ ಕೂಡ ಹೇಳಬಹುದು. [You should say 'I am sleeping'. You can also say 'I am getting some sleep' to be a bit formal.] Speaker B: ಓ ಹೌದಾ. ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು? [Oh really? How to learn English?] Speaker A: ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 15 minutes daily practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, 1 month ಅಲ್ಲಿ English ಕಲಿಯಬಹುದು. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you can learn English in 1 month.] Speaker B: ಇದಕ್ಕೆ ತುಂಬಾ ಖರ್ಚಾಗುತ್ತಾ? [Does this cost a lot?] Speaker A: ಕೇವಲ 1 Rupee ಗೆ ಈ app ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣವಾಗಿ try ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. 1 crores+ people ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ English ಕಲಿತಾ ಇದ್ದಾರೆ. [You can try this app completely for just 1 Rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Speaker B: ಸೂಪರ್! ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super! How to join?] Speaker A: ಈಗಲೇ MySivi app download ಮಾಡಿ English ಕಲಿಯೋದನ್ನು ಶುರು ಮಾಡು. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.

summary: The ad features two AI avatars conversing in Kannada about learning English. One avatar corrects the other's grammar and introduces the MySivi AI English Speaking App as an affordable way to practice daily. The call to action urges viewers to download the app to start learning.
